summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Rinkosh fintech platform iteration 4 with focus on language toggle functionality and user feedback fixes. Backend APIs working excellently (100% success rate). Language toggle working well on most pages but has minor issues with navigation buttons. Admin dashboard and analytics fully functional with Hindi translation support.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation buttons (Login, Find Best Loan) don't change to Hindi when language toggle is switched
React error boundary triggered during onboarding flow completion

integration_issues.issue: Session timeouts during extended testing causing redirects to login

passed_tests: Backend health check and all 26 API endpoints (100% success rate)
35 loan products available (13 personal, 10 home, 6 car, 3 education, 3 bike)
Language toggle on landing page - Hero heading changes from 'Stop Overpaying on Loans' to 'लोन पर ज़्यादा पैसे देना बंद करें'
Language toggle on landing page - Motto changes from 'No Spam. No Secrets. Just Savings.' to 'कोई स्पैम नहीं। कोई राज़ नहीं। बस बचत।'
Language toggle on landing page - Features section changes to Hindi (पारदर्शी तुलना, शून्य स्पैम गारंटी)
Language toggle on landing page - Steps section changes to Hindi (अपने बारे में बताएं, रैंक्ड सिफारिशें पाएं)
Language toggle on landing page - Stats section changes to Hindi (बैंक और NBFC, लोन श्रेणियां, डेटा नियंत्रण, स्पैम कॉल)
Language toggle on landing page - Trust section heading changes to Hindi (आपकी गोपनीयता पवित्र है)
Language toggle on landing page - CTA section changes to Hindi (अपने अगले लोन पर बचत के लिए तैयार?, मुफ्त में शुरू करें)
Admin dashboard accessible at /admin for admin@rinkosh.com
Admin dashboard shows analytics with total users (10), total leads (4), lead funnel chart, leads by bank pie chart
Admin dashboard commission tracking and recent leads table functional
Language toggle on admin dashboard - Title changes from 'Admin Analytics' to 'एडमिन एनालिटिक्स'
Language toggle on admin dashboard - Section headings change to Hindi (लीड फ़नल, बैंक अनुसार लीड्स, कमीशन ट्रैकिंग, हाल के लीड्स)
Dashboard tabs clearly visible (Recommendations, My Leads, Credit Builder, AI Advisor)
User registration flow working successfully
AI advisor endpoint working with proper responses
Credit builder suggestions endpoint functional
Lead management system working (create, update, revoke)
Language persistence in localStorage
Admin access control working (non-admin users get 403 on admin endpoints)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix navigation buttons on landing page to use translation system for Hindi text. Resolve OnboardingPage React error boundary issue. Consider improving session management for better user experience during extended usage.
